Handmade

Hand-painted frames, chalk-finished keepsakes and dried florals — made one piece at a time.

Our story

Ten years at the kitchen table

Loobylou's started as a way to fill spare evenings — a tin of chalk paint, an old frame picked up for pennies, and a bit of patience. Ten years on, that same kitchen table is still where every piece begins: hand-painted, distressed, and finished with dried lavender and vintage transfers.

It's stayed a hobby by choice, not by accident — every piece is made in small batches, never rushed, and never quite the same twice. Now it's time to share it a little more widely.

— Louise
